articles.description: Liam Rosenior is facing criticism for his early tenure as Chelsea manager - but is it fair, and are his players on board ahead of the climax to the season?
articles.title: Chelsea: Appraising Liam Rosenior's early Chelsea tenure

articles.description: Phil Foden's injury-time appearance in Manchester City's Carabao Cup final victory over Arsenal felt like a "charity" substitution, says former England captain Wayne Rooney.
articles.title: Wayne Rooney: Phil Foden final appearance like a 'charity sub'

articles.description: Newcastle want to be one of the top clubs in the world by 2030. BBC Sport examines why their Saudi owners are going to have to show a lot more ambition to get anywhere near that.
articles.title: Newcastle v the system - is Saudi 2030 vision unrealistic?

articles.description: Ben Stokes says the past three months have been "the hardest period" of his England captaincy, and backs the current regime to take the team forward.
articles.title: Ben Stokes: England captain says past three months 'hardest period' of his tenure

articles.description: Tottenham offer condolences to interim head coach Igor Tudor following the death of his father.
articles.title: Igor Tudor: Father of Tottenham interim coach dies as club offer condolences

articles.description: Matt Fitzpatrick's third US PGA Tour title comes off the back of posting impressive stats in bedrock categories essential to success at Augusta as the Masters moves into view, writes Iain Carter.
articles.title: The Masters: Why in-form Matt Fitzpatrick's game puts him among Augusta favourites

articles.description: Olympic champion Sifan Hassan withdraws from next month's London Marathon because of an Achilles injury.
articles.title: London Marathon 2026: Olympic champion Sifan Hassan withdraws after injury

articles.description: Welsh manager Steve Cooper is accused of dropping a Bosnia-Herzegovina player from Brondby ahead of Wales' World Cup qualifier, a claim his club denies.
articles.title: Steve Cooper: Brondby manager accused of dropping player ahead of Wales' match

articles.description: Arsenal's Alessia Russo has excelled as a number nine and a number 10 this season, but where is she most effective?
articles.title: Alessia Russo: What is Arsenal forward's best position?

articles.description: Anthony Gordon says Newcastle United's defeat by rivals Sunderland is "not good enough" because the Black Cats are "not very good" compared with the Magpies.
articles.title: Anthony Gordon: Sunderland are 'not very good' compared with Newcastle United
